summary: AI Dream Oracle Integration - All 10 features tested and verified. Dream Oracle mode appears in Sage coach, dream picker shows user's logged dreams with metadata (title, mood, moon phase, vividness, date), AI analysis returns cosmic interpretation with profile badge, follow-up questions maintain context, session list shows dream oracle sessions with Moon icon, saved sessions restore correctly, other coaching modes still work.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with 2 logged dreams
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dream Oracle integration complete. Test user has 2 dreams logged. Backend APIs: GET /api/coach/modes returns dream_oracle, GET /api/coach/dreams returns user dreams, POST /api/coach/analyze-dream returns AI interpretation with cosmic_profile. Frontend: DreamPicker component shows dreams with metadata, CosmicProfileBadge shows aura color and moon phase, follow-up chat maintains dream context.

dream_oracle_mode_visible.description: Dream Oracle appears as mode option in Sage coach with Moon icon

dream_picker_shows_dreams.description: Dream picker displays 2 user dreams with title, content preview, moon phase, mood, vividness, date, and Lucid badge

dream_analysis_works.description: Selecting dream triggers AI analysis, returns detailed interpretation with sections (Cosmic Mirror, Numerological Thread, Shadow Whisper, Soul Message, Practical Oracle)

cosmic_profile_badge.description: After analysis, badge shows 'Dream Lens: Aura: blue, First Quarter' with aura color and moon phase

followup_maintains_context.description: Follow-up question 'What does the wolf represent?' received contextual response about wolf symbolism in the dream

session_list_moon_icon.description: Session list shows Dream Oracle sessions with Moon icon, message count, and preview

saved_session_restore.description: Opening saved dream oracle session restores full conversation with analysis

other_modes_work.description: Spiritual Guidance and Life Coaching modes tested - both work correctly with AI responses

back_navigation_dream_picker.description: 'Back to modes' button visible in dream picker

back_navigation_chat.description: 'All conversations' back button works from chat view

api_verification.GET /api/coach/modes: Returns 6 modes including dream_oracle with color #818CF8
api_verification.GET /api/coach/dreams: Returns 2 dreams with id, title, content, mood, moon_phase, vividness, lucid, symbols, created_at
api_verification.POST /api/coach/analyze-dream: Returns AI interpretation with cosmic_profile (aura_color, life_path, birth_card, moon_phase)
api_verification.POST /api/coach/chat: Follow-up questions work with dream context maintained
